instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_001) recommending balanced meals to a client. You have just pointed out three dishes in sequence. First, ask the AI Service Agent to check the protein content of the dish located at the far right and highest position on the menu. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the protein content of this dish is less than 35 grams, then ask the AI Service Agent to find the item with the highest protein content priced above 40 yuan within the category located in the middle position of the menu's middle fold featuring a hand illustration, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to filter for a dish that is rich in iron and has the lowest calories within the category on the right fold featuring a dark background with white text, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if there is a meal combo that includes the dish just selected. If so, remove the dish just added from the order, and instead add the meal combo containing this dish to the order. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total fat in the current order exceeds 60 grams, then ask the AI Service Agent to remove the non-combo dish with the highest fat content from the current order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable after discounts and the total tax for the order.

diff.notes: Task has not yet been rebuilt from instruction, visual evidence, and tool replay.

instruction: You are a budget-conscious student (User ID: customer_004) with 100 yuan available to spend. You have pointed at three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI Service Agent to check the price of the dish among those that contains fresh fruit ingredients. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the unit price of that dish is below 60 yuan, ask the AI Service Agent to select the item with the lowest price among those with spicy/herbal flavors in the category located at the bottom of the middle fold with a small hand illustration on the left of the title, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to add the item with the highest calories among those with nut/herbal flavors in the independent section with smaller volume located at the bottom right of the menu to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Afterwards, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total price of the current order exceeds 100 yuan, ask the AI Service Agent to replace the most expensive non-set dish in the order with a set combination from the system sets that includes handmade bread and has the lowest overall price. If there are multiple sets tied for the lowest overall price, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total protein content and total tax amount for the final order.

diff.notes: Task has not yet been rebuilt from instruction, visual evidence, and tool replay.

instruction: You are a diner who is very cautious about allergens (User ID: customer_003) and are allergic to dairy and gluten. You pointed out three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI service agent to check the allergen list of the leftmost dish you are pointing at. Ask the AI service agent to determine whether it contains dairy allergens. If it does, ask the AI service agent to find a dish within the section on the left border of the right page of the menu that has a small hand illustration, which does not contain egg allergens and has the highest dietary fiber content, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest dietary fiber content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to select the dish with the lowest sodium content among those with an earthy/fruity aroma and high calcium within the white rounded small card category directly above the leftmost dish you are pointing at, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI service agent to check the order. If the total amount of non-set meal dishes in the order is less than 50 yuan, ask the AI service agent to change the quantity of the dish just added to two portions. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total tax and total calorie count for the current order.

If so, ask the AI Service Agent to additionally pick the dish with the lowest calories from the bottom area of the left fold and add it to the order. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the sodium content of this dish exceeds 1000mg, then ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category on the right fold with a small hand illustration on the left border, find the item with a fresh/slightly sour taste and the lowest sodium content, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select the item with the highest protein content from the bottom area of the middle fold and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total sodium content in the current order exceeds 1500mg, then ask the AI Service Agent to remove the non-set meal dish with the highest sodium content from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the final amount payable after discount.

instruction: You are a budget-conscious student (User ID: customer_007) with only 100 yuan. You have specified three dishes in order. Please ask the AI Service Agent to check the price of the leftmost dish. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select a nut/herbal flavor item with the highest calories from the smaller volume section at the bottom of the right fold and add it to the order. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the current total order amount exceeds 100 yuan, ask the AI Service Agent to remove the most expensive dish (including combos) from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable including tax.
